workshop-mcp-server.description: AI-Powered Development Assistant with code review, GitHub PR automation, OpenShift test generation & execution, must-gather analysis, and cluster debugging capabilities
workshop-mcp-server.author: Workshop MCP Team
capabilities: Code Review - Line-by-line analysis with security, performance, and quality checks
PR Review - Automated GitHub PR reviews with comments
OpenShift Testing - Test generation (Gherkin/YAML/Go/Shell) and execution
Must-Gather Analyzer - Cluster health assessment with AI-powered diagnostics
Cluster Debugger - Intelligent issue analysis with fix recommendations
